mano_cua.result_summary: Vue 应用正常挂载但 PDF 文件从 GitHub raw content 加载失败（ERR_PROXY_CONNECTION_FAILED），页面空白无 PDF 渲染，无法测试高亮功能。代理问题导致外部资源不可用
mano_cua.last_reasoning: VuePDF playground app running at localhost:5173. Vue app mounted successfully but PDF file from raw.githubusercontent.com failed to load due to ERR_PROXY_CONNECTION_FAILED. Page blank with no PDF rendered. No highlight UI controls visible. Cannot test text highlight feature without a loaded PDF.
